subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Thy recent letter which caused great sorrow and painful grief has arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان تحریر اخیر که مورث حزن عظیم و ماتم الیم بود رسید حسرت و کدورت
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @laws of marriage and dowry, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
